content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 4.5.1–4.5.3 WARN — HomeKit imported and HMHomeManager instantiated in WallpaperGridView.swift:4-5 with no home-automation UI; the app is a wallpaper gallery unrelated to HomeKit.
Pierre: Apple flags HomeKit entitlements used without genuine home-automation features as likely misuse, and this can trigger a rejection or entitlement revocation. Here HMHomeManager is created but never used to display accessories, rooms, or homes — it appears vestigial or copy-pasted. Remove the HomeKit import/entitlement and manager instantiation unless real home-automation functionality is planned.
